intent: doctor 净化 + 静默化(fallback-purge 收尾 grill 派生 Goal X 第2/3波)。第1波删 knowledge-sync 空转壳已落 e037897。
goal: 让 fabric doctor 别谎报体检(删 ~13 个 store-cutover 掏空的空桩 check)+ 别刷屏(默认只显 warn/error, 全列表挪 --verbose)。命名 gate 全绿即达成。

in_scope: W2: 删 doctor.ts ~13 个空桩 check(empty*Inspection / {candidates|duplicates|...:[]} 硬编码)+ create*Check 渲染器 + checks[] 接线 + apply-lint 死 mutation 臂 + 专用类型 + i18n en/zh 文案 key + server doctor.test check-list 断言
W3: renderHumanReport 默认只打印 check.status!=='ok'(warn/error), --verbose 打全部; 同步 doctor 输出测试 + 快照
out_of_scope: 保留 LIVE store-aware check: underseeded / summary-opaque / store_counter_drift / session_hints_stale / skill_md_yaml / hooks_* / promote_ledger_invariant / onboard_coverage / stale_serve_lock / global_cli / bootstrap anchor+L1+L2 / scan evidence
不拆 doctor.ts god-file(用户否了删+拆大重构)
不碰 event-ledger auto-heal-after-drift trigger enum(受 census 钉, 留 schema)
cosmetic over-export nit(knip 5 export+13 type+6 duplicate)跳过
store 版读侧 lint 重实现 = Goal Y, 不在本 goal(本 goal 只删+诚实化, 不重建)
constraints: 铁律: 删任何 stub 前 grep 验 Species A(过渡桩删)vs B(防御留); 行号会漂以 grep 为准(KT-PIT-0002)
i18n 删 key 必须 en+zh 等量删, 删后跑 locale-parity.test 确认 en=zh 重新平衡(G-INVARIANT)
删 apply-lint 臂前确认其聚合事件(如 relevance_migration_run)是否被 event-ledger-census 钉
防 false-green: 删 check 后跑全测试确认无断言悬空; 快照 -u 前肉眼 diff 确认变化都是'少印 ok 行'
每波: tsc --noEmit + 全量测试 0 fail 0 skip + git commit + 原子更新 status.json
行动手册 spec = .workflow/.scratchpad/doctor-decruft-goal-x.md(引用不复制)

ship_criteria.name: G-HONEST
ship_criteria.target: doctor 不再列空桩 check; ~13 stub check(orphan_demote/stale_archive/pending_overdue/stable_id_collision/layer_mismatch/relevance×3/personal_layer_misclassify/suspicious_kb/narrow_too_few/relevance_fields/draft_auto_promote/filesystem_edit/baseline_filename)删净
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: grep -cE 'empty(OrphanDemote|StaleArchive|PendingOverdue|PendingAutoArchive|RelevanceFieldsMissing|NarrowTooFew|DraftAutoPromote|FilesystemEditFallback)Inspection' packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts (目标 0) && grep -c 'collisions: \[\]\|duplicates: \[\]\|mismatches: \[\]\|offenders: \[\]' packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts (目标 0)

ship_criteria.name: G-QUIET
ship_criteria.target: fabric doctor 默认只显 warn/error(+TL;DR), 全 check 列表仅 --verbose
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE: 读 renderHumanReport(packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts ~L661) 确认 check 枚举 gate 在 verbose; 跑 cli doctor 输出测试绿 + 肉眼跑 fabric doctor 看只剩问题行

ship_criteria.name: G-GREEN
ship_criteria.target: tsc --noEmit ✓ + 全量测试 0 fail 0 skip + census/parity 闸绿
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm -r --if-present test 2>&1 | grep -E 'Tests +[0-9]+ (passed|failed|skipped)' && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared exec vitest run src/i18n/locale-parity.test.ts src/schemas/event-ledger-census.test.ts

task_decomposition.subject: 删 doctor ~13 空桩 check(诚实化)+ 全级联(i18n en/zh + parity 闸 + event census + checks[] + apply-lint 臂 + 类型 + server doctor.test 断言)
task_decomposition.done_when: grep 验空桩 0; locale-parity en=zh 重新平衡; event census 绿; tsc + 全测试 0 fail 0 skip

verification.verifier: grep 空桩计数 + locale-parity + 全测试

task_decomposition.subject: doctor 默认静默(renderHumanReport 只印 warn/error, 全列表挪 --verbose)+ 同步输出测试/快照
task_decomposition.done_when: 默认输出只剩问题行; --verbose 全列; cli 输出测试 + 快照绿(肉眼 diff 确认)
